D1 Optics L4 Analyze Reference

Poynting Vector

scale E and B and watch their cross product carry energy along the direction of travel

The Poynting vector S gives the instantaneous energy flux of an electromagnetic field — its magnitude is the watts per square metre crossing a surface.

Scale E (crimson) and B (gold) independently. The dark Poynting vector S responds as their cross product; the right-side bar shows relative intensity |S| = |E|·|B|.
